creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
rg "the the " /usr/ports --sort path

Output includes some things that should be fixed in the ports repo, some that should be fixed upstream. 

Amongst the matches: 


/usr/ports/Mk/Uses/python.mk
530:# tokens if it's a single character. Only use the the first 3 tokens of

/usr/ports/audio/jconvolver/pkg-descr
7:size, running at priorities just below the the one of JACK's processing thread.

/usr/ports/audio/jmatconvol/pkg-descr
7:size, running at priorities just below the the one of JACK's processing thread.
